sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key=%s LIMIT %d, %d",
					$key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE meta_key=%s GROUP BY post_id LIMIT %d, %d",
					Modules\Smush::$smushed_meta_key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, path, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )  GROUP BY id ORDER BY id", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, path, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE {$condition} && last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )  GROUP BY id ORDER BY id", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT id, path, error
					FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images
					WHERE error IS NOT NULL
						AND last_scan = ( SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )
					LIMIT $limit",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			"SELECT COUNT(id)
					FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images
					WHERE error IS NOT NULL AND last_scan = ( SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT path, image_size, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE image_size IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `id` LIMIT %d, %d",
					$offset,
					$limit
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, image_size, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images ) GROUP BY id", ARRAY_A )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id, meta_key FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_value LIKE %s LIMIT 1", $path_like ) )
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT post_modified_gmt FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_type = 'attachment' ORDER BY post_modified_gmt DESC LIMIT 1;" )

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id ) )

sinks.expression:
printf( /* translators: 1:
, 2: Open the link , 3: Close the link */ esc_html__( 'Your site’s faster and lighter than ever. Plus, Smush will keep every new image optimized, free for life. %1$sHappy with the results? Share the love with a 5-star review on %2$sWordPress.org%3$s.', 'wp-smushit' ), '
', '', '' )
printf( esc_html( $mail_title ), '' . esc_html( $clean_site_url ) . '' )
printf( esc_html__( 'Unlock Ultra Smush, blazing-fast CDN, and more. %1$sGet Smush Pro%2$s🚀', 'wp-smushit' ), '', '' )

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id ) )

wp_send_json_success(
			array(
				'success' => $status,
				'src'     => ! empty( $file_name ) ? $file_name : __( 'Error getting file name', 'wp-smushit' ),
				'thumb'   => wp_get_attachment_image( $id ),
				'link'    => $media_item->get_edit_link(),
				'error_code' => $status ? '' : $optimizer->get_restoration_errors()->get_error_code(),
			)
		)

wp_send_json_error(
				array(
					'error'         => 'unauthorized',
					'error_message' => esc_html__( "You don't have permission to do this.", 'wp-smushit' ),
				),
				403
			)

wp_send_json_error(
				array(
					'error'         => 'hub_access_required',
					'error_message' => esc_html__( 'A WPMU DEV Hub connection is required to optimize images.', 'wp-smushit' ),
				),
				403
			)

wp_die(
				esc_html__( 'Required library is missing. Please reinstall the plugin.', 'wp-smushit' ),
				esc_html__( 'Library Error', 'wp-smushit' ),
				array(
					'response'  => 500,
					'back_link' => true,
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key=%s LIMIT %d, %d",
					$key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE meta_key=%s GROUP BY post_id LIMIT %d, %d",
					Modules\Smush::$smushed_meta_key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)
			)

$wpdb->query( "
				UPDATE {$table}
				SET 
				  {$value_column} = CASE
				      WHEN COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT({$value_column}, '$.timestamp'), 0) + {$time_window} < {$time_now} THEN 
				        JSON_SET({$value_column}, '$.timestamp', {$time_now}, '$.event_count', 0)
				      ELSE
				        JSON_SET({$value_column}, '$.event_count', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT({$value_column}, '$.event_count'), 0) + 1)
				    END
				WHERE {$column} = '{$option_key}';
			" )

preg_replace(
			'/<div class="wp-block-embed__wrapper">\s*<div class="lazyload smush-lazyload-video\b/',
			'<div class="wp-block-embed__wrapper has-smush-lazyload-video"><div class="lazyload smush-lazyload-video',
			$content
		)
header( 'Expires: ' . gmdate( 'D, d M Y H:i:s', time() + $expires ) . ' GMT' )
wp_send_json_error( array( 'message' => __( 'Not found any failed items.', 'wp-smushit' ) ) )

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images SET error=NULL, image_size=%d, file_time=%d, lossy=%d, meta=%d WHERE id=%d LIMIT 1",
				$results['data']->after_size,
				filectime( $path ), // Get file time.
				$this->settings->get_dir_lossy_level_setting(),
				$this->settings->get( 'dir_strip_exif' ),
				$id
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, path, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )  GROUP BY id ORDER BY id", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, path, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE {$condition} && last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )  GROUP BY id ORDER BY id", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT id, path, error
					FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images
					WHERE error IS NOT NULL
						AND last_scan = ( SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )
					LIMIT $limit",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			"SELECT COUNT(id)
					FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images
					WHERE error IS NOT NULL AND last_scan = ( SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images )"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT path, image_size, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE image_size IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `id` LIMIT %d, %d",
					$offset,
					$limit
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT id, image_size, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE last_scan = (SELECT MAX(last_scan) FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images ) GROUP BY id", ARRAY_A )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id, meta_key FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_value LIKE %s LIMIT 1", $path_like ) )
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT post_modified_gmt FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_type = 'attachment' ORDER BY post_modified_gmt DESC LIMIT 1;" )

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id ) )

$wpdb->query(
			"INSERT INTO {$table} (`{$column}`, `{$value_column}`)
			 VALUES ({$prepared_id}, {$prepared_val})
			 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `{$value_column}` = {$prepared_val}"
		)

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
			"INSERT INTO {$table} (`{$column}`, `{$value_column}`)
			 VALUES (%s, '{}')
			 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
			     `{$value_column}` = IF(JSON_VALID(`{$value_column}`), `{$value_column}`, '{}')",
			$option_id
		) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
			"INSERT INTO {$table} (`{$column}`, `{$value_column}`)
			 VALUES (%s, '[]')
			 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
			     `{$value_column}` = IF(JSON_VALID(`{$value_column}`), `{$value_column}`, '[]')",
			$option_id
		) )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

printf( wp_kses( /* translators: %1$s - Requires PHP version - %2$s URL to an article about our hosting benefits. */ __( 'Your site is running an outdated version of PHP that is no longer supported or receiving security updates. Please update PHP to at least version %1$s at your hosting provider in order to activate Smush, or consider switching to WPMU DEV Hosting.', 'wp-smushit' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target' => array(), 'rel' => array(), ), 'strong' => array(), ) ), esc_html( WP_SMUSH_MIN_PHP_VERSION ), 'https://wpmudev.com/hosting/' )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( _n( '%1$s%2$d attachment%3$s that needs smushing', '%1$s%2$d attachments%3$s that need smushing', $optimize_count, 'wp-smushit' ) )
esc_html( _n( '%1$s%2$d attachment%3$s that needs re-smushing', '%1$s%2$d attachments%3$s that need re-smushing', $reoptimize_count, 'wp-smushit' ) )

$wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT post_id
				FROM {$wpdb->postmeta}
				WHERE meta_key=%s AND (`meta_value` LIKE %s OR `meta_value` LIKE %s)",
				Media_Item::get_backup_sizes_meta_key(),
				$backup_key_like,
				$png_key_like
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT DISTINCT post_meta_error.post_id FROM $wpdb->postmeta as post_meta_error
			LEFT JOIN $wpdb->postmeta as post_meta_ignore ON post_meta_ignore.post_id = post_meta_error.post_id AND post_meta_ignore.meta_key= %s
			WHERE post_meta_ignore.meta_value IS NULL AND post_meta_error.meta_key = %s
			ORDER BY post_meta_error.post_id DESC LIMIT %d;",
			Media_Item::get_ignored_meta_key(),
			Media_Item_Optimizer::get_error_meta_key(),
			$limit
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key=%s LIMIT %d, %d",
					$key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				sprintf(
					'SELECT ID FROM `%s` WHERE post_type = "attachment" AND post_mime_type IN (%s)',
					$wpdb->posts,
					implode( ',', array_fill( 0, count( Core::$mime_types ), '%s' ) )
				),
				Core::$mime_types
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key=%s",
				Modules\Smush::$smushed_meta_key
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_id, meta_value FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE meta_key=%s GROUP BY post_id LIMIT %d, %d",
					Modules\Smush::$smushed_meta_key,
					$offset,
					$this->query_limit
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT postmeta.post_id) FROM $wpdb->postmeta as postmeta
                    INNER JOIN $wpdb->posts as posts
                        ON postmeta.post_id = posts.ID AND posts.post_type = 'attachment'
                        AND posts.post_mime_type IN ('". $mime_types ."')
					WHERE meta_key = %s
					OR meta_key = %s
					OR (meta_key = %s AND meta_value = %s)",
			$ignored_key,
			$animated_key,
			$error_meta_key,
			$animated_error_value
		)
esc_html( _n( 'Found %d attachment that needs smushing', 'Found %1$d attachments that need smushing', $optimize_count, 'wp-smushit' ) )
esc_html( _n( 'Found %d attachment that needs re-smushing', 'Found %d attachments that need re-smushing', $reoptimize_count, 'wp-smushit' ) )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_id) FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE meta_key = %s AND meta_value = 1", Smush_Optimization::get_lossy_meta_key() )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_meta_optimized.post_id) FROM $wpdb->postmeta as post_meta_optimized
			LEFT JOIN $wpdb->postmeta as post_meta_ignored ON post_meta_optimized.post_id = post_meta_ignored.post_id AND post_meta_ignored.meta_key= %s
			WHERE post_meta_optimized.meta_key = %s AND post_meta_ignored.meta_value IS NULL",
			Media_Item::get_ignored_meta_key(),
			Smush_Optimization::get_smush_meta_key()
		)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_id) FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE meta_key = %s", Media_Item::get_ignored_meta_key() )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images SET error=NULL, image_size=%d, file_time=%d, lossy=%d, meta=%d WHERE id=%d LIMIT 1",
				$results['data']->after_size,
				filectime( $path ), // Get file time.
				$this->settings->get_dir_lossy_level_setting(),
				$this->settings->get( 'dir_strip_exif' ),
				$id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT path, image_size, orig_size FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}smush_dir_images WHERE image_size IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `id` LIMIT %d, %d",
					$offset,
					$limit
				)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id, meta_key FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_value LIKE %s LIMIT 1", $path_like )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT ID, post_content FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_content LIKE %s", $old_url_like )

$wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} = %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $option_id )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"INSERT INTO {$table} (`{$column}`, `{$value_column}`)
			 VALUES (%s, '{}')
			 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
			     `{$value_column}` = IF(JSON_VALID(`{$value_column}`), `{$value_column}`, '{}')",
			$option_id
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"INSERT INTO {$table} (`{$column}`, `{$value_column}`)
			 VALUES (%s, '[]')
			 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
			     `{$value_column}` = IF(JSON_VALID(`{$value_column}`), `{$value_column}`, '[]')",
			$option_id
		)

wp_kses( /* translators: %1$s - Requires PHP version - %2$s URL to an article about our hosting benefits. */ __( 'Your site is running an outdated version of PHP that is no longer supported or receiving security updates. Please update PHP to at least version %1$s at your hosting provider in order to activate Smush, or consider switching to WPMU DEV Hosting.', 'wp-smushit' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target' => array(), 'rel' => array(), ), 'strong' => array(), ) )
